g.text: • ESP32 GPIO is 3.3V — HC-SR04 ECHO is 5V logic: voltage divider required to protect GPIO19.
• TB6612FNG STBY must be HIGH (GPIO13) to enable motor outputs.
• Motor battery (VM) is separate from logic supply (3.3V). Common GND required.
• GPIO34/35 are input-only pins on ESP32 — correct for encoder DO signals.
